Active Work Architecture
─[ Pilot Kickoff Checklist ]─ ┐

Pilot Kickoff Checklist

Use this once before Day 1 work starts.

Scope

  • Confirm pilot topology: 2-tier only (team root -> instance)
  • Confirm participants (1-2 people)
  • Confirm pilot window (3-5 days)

Environment Readiness

  • Deploy team-root repository from clean source
  • Deploy instance repository (and optional second instance)
  • Verify .lore-config at each level is correct
  • Verify parent URL is reachable from instance(s)

Baseline Validation

  • Run bash scripts/validate-consistency.sh in team repo
  • Run bash scripts/validate-consistency.sh in each instance repo
  • Confirm no local uncommitted setup artifacts that should be excluded

Instrumentation Setup

  • Confirm scripts/pilot-log-event.py exists and runs
  • Confirm scripts/pilot-generate-report.py exists and runs
  • Create initial event log entry (deploy_minutes)
  • Confirm report generation creates data/report.md

Workflow Alignment

  • Review conflict resolution path (list-sync-conflicts.sh, resolve-sync-conflicts.sh)
  • Review contribution path (/contribute-to-team, PR-first)
  • Confirm daily cadence (sync -> work -> reconcile -> contribute)
  • Confirm who owns daily review/merge decisions

Kickoff Record

  • Record kickoff timestamp
  • Record participants and repository URLs
  • Record Day 1 start condition and known risks
PgUp/PgDn: scroll b: bulk commands q: quit x: menu ← → ↑ ↓: navigate
